      • validateOptions(opts: PairedFastqFilterOptions)

Types

FastqFilterOptions = object
  truncLen*: int
  truncQ*: int
  maxLen*: int
  maxEE*: float
  maxN*: int
  minLen*: int
  minQ*: int
  trimLeft*: int
  trimRight*: int
  chunkSize*: int
  threads*: int
  parallelMinChunk*: int
FastqFilterStats = object
  inputReads*: int64
  outputReads*: int64
  discardedReads*: int64
  rejectedByReason*: array[FilterRejectReason, int64]
FastqPairedFilterStats = object
  inputPairs*: int64
  outputPairs*: int64
  discardedPairs*: int64
  forwardStats*: FastqFilterStats
  reverseStats*: FastqFilterStats
  rejectedByPairReason*: array[PairRejectReason, int64]
FilterRejectReason = enum
  frrNone, frrTooLong, frrTrimmedEmpty, frrTruncLen, frrTooShort, frrTooManyN,
  frrLowMinQ, frrTooManyExpectedErrors, frrMalformedQuality
PairedFastqFilterOptions = object
  forward*: FastqFilterOptions
  reverse*: FastqFilterOptions
  checkNames*: bool
PairRejectReason = enum
  prrForwardFailed, prrReverseFailed, prrBothFailed

Procs

proc defaultFastqFilterOptions(): FastqFilterOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc defaultPairedFastqFilterOptions(): PairedFastqFilterOptions {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: FastqFilterOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc describe(opts: PairedFastqFilterOptions): string {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc discardRatio(stats: FastqFilterStats): float {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc discardRatio(stats: FastqPairedFilterStats): float {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc fastqFilter(inputPath, outputPath: string;
                 opts: FastqFilterOptions = defaultFastqFilterOptions()): FastqFilterStats {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, IOError], tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc fastqPairedFilter(inputPath1, inputPath2: string;
                       outputPath1, outputPath2: string; opts: PairedFastqFilterOptions = defaultPairedFastqFilterOptions()): FastqPairedFilterStats {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, IOError], tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: FastqFilterOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: PairedFastqFilterOptions) {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
